questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the conversation.
Receptionist: Good afternoon, Arda Clinic.
Caller: Could I speak to Dr. Selin?
Receptionist: She is with a patient now.
Question: What should receptionist ask next?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Can I take a message?
Ek Soru 1 — Why did you call?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Resmi telefon dilinde standart devam cümlesi budur.

[GitHub Ek Test — On the Phone]
questions.ipucu: Müsait olmayan kişi için kullanılan kalıbı hatırla.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the dialogue.
Baran: May I talk to Duru?
Mother: She isn't home right now.
Question: Which reply is most appropriate?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Okay, I'll call back later.
Ek Soru 1 — Give me your address.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Nazik ve doğal devam cümlesi call back later olur.

[GitHub Ek Test — On the Phone]

options: Ek Soru 1 — Wait on the line

questions.question:

Cem: Could you spell your surname, please?

options: Ek Soru 1 — To check details correctly
Ek Soru 1 — To end call quickly
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Spelling istemek doğru bilgi kaydı içindir.

questions.question:

questions.question:

questions.explanation:

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the call ending.
Caller: Thank you for your help.
Agent: You're welcome. Have a nice day.
Question: What should happen next?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Continue with unrelated talk
Ek Soru 1 — Politely end the call
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Kapanış ifadelerinden sonra uygun adım görüşmeyi bitirmektir.

[GitHub Ek Test — On the Phone]
questions.ipucu: Have a nice day ifadesi kapanış sinyalidir.
